info.name: Rakez ERP API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Rakez ERP system. Real estate ERP with Sales, Accounting, Credit, HR, Marketing, Inventory, AI Calling, Ads, and Chat modules.

## Auth
All protected routes require:
`Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

## Setup
1. Set `base_url` variable to your server URL (e.g. `http://localhost:8000`)
2. Login and paste the returned token into the `token` variable
3. All subsequent requests will use the token automatically

## Roles
- `admin` — full access
- `sales` / `sales_leader` — sales module
- `accounting` — accounting module
- `credit` — credit module
- `hr` — HR module
- `marketing` — marketing module
- `inventory` — inventory module
- `editor` — content editing
- `project_management` — project management

request.description: Rate limited to 5 attempts/minute per IP. Returns Sanctum bearer token.

item.name: AI Calling
item.description: Requires role: admin | sales | sales_leader | marketing

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Luxury Project Follow-Up",
  "language": "ar",
  "greeting": "السلام عليكم، أنا منى من فريق ريكيز للعقارات",
  "body": "اتصل بكم بخصوص مشروع برج صنرايز الرائع...",
  "closing": "شكراً جزيلاً على وقتكم"
}

item.name: Twilio Webhooks
item.description: Called by Twilio only. Validated with Twilio signature middleware. Do NOT call manually in production.
